label: |M| MINT
riskReward: very low risk while parked / tactical when deployed
operatorMeaning: immediate dip-buy leverage, not permanent full deployment

label: |W| WHITE
riskReward: lowest risk / lowest payout / maximum deployability
operatorMeaning: cash-like safety, instant buying power, minimal drawdown

label: [B] BLUE
riskReward: low risk / modest payout / controlled downside
operatorMeaning: stable carry, short duration, higher-quality credit, floating-rate ballast

label: [G] GREEN
riskReward: medium risk / real income / DRiP-compatible growth
operatorMeaning: core carry, structured reinvestment, buy-the-dip fuel
